query: amateur snapshot with crooked tilted horizon, accidentally rotated photo, off-kilter handheld shot
message: composition_and_structure / unconventional_framing — anti_aesthetic. Off-kilter, dutch-angle, accidentally rotated handheld snapshots with informal vernacular framing. Includes parties, sports wipeouts, fallen signs, casual portraiture, awkward angles.

response.objective_caption: A red Wilson PowerLine tennis racket with white strings and a red vibration dampener rests on a white surface beside a clear plastic tennis ball tube with a black cap. Three bright yellow tennis balls sit nearby; one ball has been cut open to reveal red grapefruit flesh and pulp inside, and a crescent-shaped slice of the fruit rests in the foreground.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A red Wilson PowerLine tennis racket and a clear plastic tennis ball tube rest on a white surface near three bright yellow tennis balls in a surreal still life arrangement. One tennis ball has been sliced open to reveal red grapefruit flesh inside, and a crescent-shaped slice sits in the foreground, creating an irrational, dreamlike juxtaposition of sports equipment and fresh fruit that rejects ordinary realism in favor of fantastical, subconscious logic.
